name: Statistic
description: Big-number statistic display with label and unit.

api.name: Statistic
api.description: Big-number statistic display with label and unit.

parameters.name: ValueContent
parameters.description: Custom value content — overrides Value. Drop in a <NumberTicker> (Lumeo.Motion) here for an animated count-up, rather than duplicating animation logic in core. (#273)

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Culture used when Precision is set. Default (null) falls back to CurrentCulture so a de-DE user sees 12,34 and an en-US user sees 12.34 automatically.

enums.name: StatisticVariant
enums.description: Default = plain (no decoration). Minimal = alias for Default (explicit opt-in to no chrome). Bordered = rounded border card wrapper.

examples.title: Basic Statistics
examples.code:
<Statistic Title="Total Users" Value="12,847" />
<Statistic Title="Revenue" Value="48250" Precision="2">
    <Prefix><Lumeo.Text As="span">$</Lumeo.Text></Prefix>
</Statistic>

examples.title: With Trend
examples.code:
<Statistic Title="Sales" Value="1,234" ShowTrend="true" TrendValue="+12.5%" TrendDirection="Statistic.TrendType.Up" />
<Statistic Title="Returns" Value="42" ShowTrend="true" TrendValue="-3.2%" TrendDirection="Statistic.TrendType.Down" />

examples.title: Size (interactive)
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_size">
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Lumeo.Size.Sm">Small</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Lumeo.Size.Md">Medium</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Lumeo.Size.Lg">Large</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>
<Statistic Title="Monthly Revenue" Value="48,290" Size="@_size" ShowTrend="true" TrendValue="+12%" TrendDirection="Statistic.TrendType.Up">
    <Prefix><Lumeo.Text As="span">$</Lumeo.Text></Prefix>
</Statistic>

@code { private Lumeo.Size _size = Lumeo.Size.Md; }

examples.title: Variant (interactive)
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_variant">
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Statistic.StatisticVariant.Default">Default</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Statistic.StatisticVariant.Minimal">Minimal</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@Statistic.StatisticVariant.Bordered">Bordered</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>
<Grid Columns="3" Gap="4">
    <Statistic Title="Users" Value="12,847" Variant="@_variant" />
    <Statistic Title="Revenue" Value="48,290" Variant="@_variant" ShowTrend="true" TrendValue="+8%" TrendDirection="Statistic.TrendType.Up">
        <Prefix><Lumeo.Text As="span">$</Lumeo.Text></Prefix>
    </Statistic>
    <Statistic Title="Churn" Value="2.1" Variant="@_variant" ShowTrend="true" TrendValue="-0.3%" TrendDirection="Statistic.TrendType.Down">
        <Suffix><Lumeo.Text As="span">%</Lumeo.Text></Suffix>
    </Statistic>
</Grid>

@code { private Statistic.StatisticVariant _variant = Statistic.StatisticVariant.Default; }

slots.name: ValueContent
slots.description: Custom value content — overrides Value. Drop in a <NumberTicker> (Lumeo.Motion) here for an animated count-up, rather than duplicating animation logic in core. (#273)

mdSummary:
# Statistic

Big-number statistic display with label and unit.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Status & Indicators
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/statistic

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Statistic | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| Statistic | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| Statistic | ValueContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom value content — overrides Value. Drop in a <NumberTicker> (Lumeo.Motion) here for an animated count-up, rather than duplicating animation logic in core. (#273) |
| Statistic | Prefix | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Statistic | Suffix | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Statistic | Precision | `int?` | `` |  |
| Statistic | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Culture used when Precision is set. Default (null) falls back to CurrentCulture so a de-DE user sees 12,34 and an en-US user sees 12.34 automatically. |
| Statistic | ShowTrend | `bool` | `` |  |
| Statistic | TrendValue | `string?` | `` |  |
| Statistic | TrendDirection | `TrendType` | `TrendType.Up` |  |
| Statistic | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` |  |
| Statistic | Variant | `StatisticVariant` | `StatisticVariant.Default` |  |
| Statistic | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Statistic | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ValueContent` (Statistic) — Custom value content — overrides Value. Drop in a <NumberTicker> (Lumeo.Motion) here for an animated count-up, rather than duplicating animation logic in core. (#273)
- `Prefix` (Statistic) — RenderFragment slot
- `Suffix` (Statistic) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Statistic />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Statistic/Statistic.razor`
